description: Move the root patches/ folder (vendored pnpm dependency patch) under .oh/patches/ so all harness build machinery lives in the .oh/ namespace as one unit (#324, follows #321/#322). Repoint package.json patchedDependencies, regenerate the lockfile, update .oh/README.md + CHANGELOG.

userStories.title: Relocate the patch and repoint its consumer
userStories.description: As the harness build, I want the gray-matter patch under .oh/patches/ and package.json/lock repointed so the patch resolves without the root patches/ folder.
acceptanceCriteria: git mv patches .oh/patches — .oh/patches/gray-matter@4.0.3.patch exists; ls patches errors
pnpm-lock.yaml regenerated via pnpm install; its path: entry points at .oh/patches/...
grep -n 'patches/' package.json pnpm-lock.yaml shows only .oh/patches/ paths
pnpm install exits 0 with the patch applied (no patch-not-found, no failed apply)
userStories.notes: DONE (executor, sonnet). git mv patches .oh/patches; package.json:64 + pnpm-lock.yaml:32 path repointed (hash unchanged — content-based). pnpm install exit 0; advisor verified pnpm install --frozen-lockfile exit 0 (patch resolves from .oh/patches/). ls patches errors; grep shows only .oh/patches/.

userStories.title: Update namespace doc and CHANGELOG
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want .oh/README.md and CHANGELOG to reflect that patches/ now lives under .oh/ so the namespace docs stay accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: .oh/README.md lists patches/ (vendored pnpm dependency patches) among .oh/ contents
Exactly one new CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry (### Changed) referencing #324/#321; no prior history altered
ONLY .oh/README.md and CHANGELOG.md are modified by this story
userStories.notes: DONE (executor, haiku). .oh/README.md contents table gained a patches/ row (between scripts/ and config.json). CHANGELOG.md gained exactly one [Unreleased] ### Changed entry referencing #324; no prior history altered. Advisor verified git diff scoped to the two files.
